Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class NetworkPageOverride

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.NetworkPageOverride
public class NetworkPageOverride extends Object

Java class for NetworkPageOverride complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="NetworkPageOverride">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="changePasswordPageOverrideSetting" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}NetworkPageOverrideSetting" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="forgotPasswordPageOverrideSetting" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}NetworkPageOverrideSetting" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="homePageOverrideSetting" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}NetworkPageOverrideSetting" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="loginPageOverrideSetting" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}NetworkPageOverrideSetting" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="selfRegProfilePageOverrideSetting" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}NetworkPageOverrideSetting" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
